title: Bloodory's distillation
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Bloodory's distillation''' was a fluid created by the researches of [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Bloodory]], a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]].

==History==
It was extracted from the brains of scientists, and contained their knowledge and experience. Just prior to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] assault on Aquilae, 33 vials were prepared for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to take to the [[Chrome Companies]] on [[Ophuchi]]. The vials would be payment for aid against the Empire. Injecting the fluid into the brains of [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] would permit the replication of these scientists, including all their training and intelligence. Skywalker carried the vials in a special [[shock belt]] designed to protect them from harm. The vials never reached Ophuchi, as Skywalker's mission was diverted by the destruction of the hijacked [[Imperial starship]] over [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]]. It is unknown whether the knowledge to make the distillation died with Dr. Bloodory when the [[Underground Fortress]] was destroyed with [[nuclear bomb]]s by the Empire.

==Behind the scenes==
This is the first mention of the concept of clones in the development of the Star Wars saga.

It is unclear whether the process kills the scientists who underwent it.
